description: Ancient Qing Dynasty architectural complex, showcasing immigrant culture and exploring the historical and cultural roots of Chongqing.
Famous Chongqing snack street, featuring authentic local delicacies such as Chongqing noodles and spicy and sour vermicelli.
Classic activity of taking a night cruise on the Yangtze River and Jialing River to enjoy the dazzling night views along the banks.
Iconic architectural complex of Chongqing, featuring stilted building style and vibrant night views, showcasing the charm of the mountain city.
The best observation deck in Chongqing, offering a 360-degree panoramic view of the Yuzhong Peninsula and an excellent spot to admire the mountain city's nightscape.
Internet-famous spectacle of a light rail passing through a building, a unique three-dimensional transportation scene in Chongqing.
Municipal art museum in Chongqing, showcasing contemporary art pieces, located in the core business district of Jiefangbei.

attraction_name: Mountain City Trail · Jianxingpo Grand Stairway
description: Chongqing's characteristic mountain city trail, offering an experience of the mountain city's lifestyle with its steep slopes and stairways, perfect for urban hiking.
A treasure trove of Chongqing's history and culture, featuring exquisite Three Gorges artifacts and exploring the city's rich historical heritage.
The most representative mountain city neighborhood in Chongqing, showcasing the traditional lifestyle and architectural features of old Chongqing.
A landmark building in Chongqing, designed in the style of an ancient palace, a classic example of modern Chinese architectural art.
Revolutionary historical site, commemorating revolutionary martyrs and learning about Chongqing's wartime history.
Riverside historical district blending traditional Bayu culture with modern commercial elements.
Chongqing's most bustling commercial center, a shopping and leisure destination to experience the city's vibrant urban life.
The confluence of two rivers, a historic port in Chongqing where visitors can take a cruise to enjoy the night views.
China's revolutionary history museum, showcasing the Hongyan Spirit during the Anti-Japanese War and the Liberation War in Chongqing.
The confluence of the Yangtze River and Jialing River, a symbolic landmark and dock of Chongqing.
